title: BankBazaar Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: BankBazaar Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BankBazaar Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Ludhiana-based team.

About BankBazaar Advisory Limited:
BankBazaar Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BankBazaar Advisory Limited!
